text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time after the team's training progress falls
into a slump...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They get embroiled in a messy incident.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh! Traaainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I thought you should know but we, uh, got roped
into an unofficial match against Team Zenith!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry! But you see...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Whose drink is this? No one's written their
name on it...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'd better move it into the shade. It'll get all warm
if it's left out in the sun like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wah! Oh no, I spilled it all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It just so happens that the drink belonged to
Little Cocon, who shows up at exactly the wrong
time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry! I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I know we're not on friendly terms, but I
didn't expect you to pull something like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, members of both teams gather to
see what the commotion is about.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
No, you're all mistaken! Rice isn't that kinda
person! There's no way she did it on purpose!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Are you trying to tell me she spilled the entire drink "on accident"? Yeah, right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the argument gets more heated, the other
members of Team Zenith attempt to intervene.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
All right, this calls for an off-the-books match!
Nothing like a little competition to settle things!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Buuut it'd be boring to just have a regular old
race. So, how about this—whoever loses is
banned from the track... forever!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Interesting proposal. I'm in. Since you're all so
weak, I'll make this even easier for you.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
If you manage to win a single race against us,
then we'll consider you the overall victors.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nnngh! You won't be so smug for long!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And that seems to be the long and short of what
happened!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurry to the track to see the contest already in
full swing.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole team is excitedly cheering on Haru
Urara from the stands.
choice_data_list: You guys already started the contest?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm super-duper sorry, but we couldn't let them
get away with bad-mouthin' us!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But they're pretty strong, so I'm not sure if Urara
is gonna be able to...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: S-so fast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race on the dirt track is only half done, but
it's clear who the winner is.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: She's too strong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara passes the finish line long after her
opponent.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
They're so fast, but they're also just so darn
unflappable...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: That's enough for warming up.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup, hup...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though their teammate just won, Team
Zenith barely spares her a glance and silently
continues their warm-ups.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a stark contrast with our team's members, who
are cheering their teammates on as hard as they
can.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Man... They're all just focused on their own
progress and work, just like members of a
professional team.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I need to get my head in the game too! By the
way, how are we doing in the races?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
W-we've lost every one?! Then... the only chances
we have left are my medium-distance race and
Rice's long-distance race?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I was awful out there... It might've been
because I couldn't focus during training.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We can't continue on like this! I'm going to warm
up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, in the race that follows...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Raaah! This is for the team! I won't lose, I won't
lose!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Guts! Glory! And gumptiooon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
How is she getting so far ahead?! I'm doing my
best over here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry... I really wanted to win, but I
couldn't... At this rate, we'll be banned from the
training grounds.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
D-don't ya worry about it! As long as Rice wins in
the long-distance race, we'll be golden!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Show 'em your stuff, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: We're counting on you, Rice! Please win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You'll be fine, Rice! You've got this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I'll w-win this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Rice Shower looks shaky and pale as
she leaves for the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a bit worried, so I run after her, only to find
her standing frozen in place.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's my fault that we got into this situation... I must win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You can do this, Rice... You can win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm just a moment too late. Rice Shower dashes
off with a pallid face before I can call out to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, my fears turn out to be justified.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... I c-can't lose! The entire team's future is at stake!

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text:
All together now... YOU GOT THIS, RICE
SHOWER!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Hah, you scaredy-cat. Running for your team's
sake isn't getting you anywhere, is it?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: You'd be better off if you just quit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower loses by a margin of five lengths.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry! It's all my fault! We'll never be able
to use the field again because of me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's not your fault, Rice. None of us were able to
win.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It'll be tough not being able to use the track,
though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team is shaken, but frankly, I don't think their
opponents should have been permitted to set
such outrageous stakes in the first place.
choice_data_list:
I'll have a word with Ms. Kashimoto about this
bet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're visibly relieved when I assure the team
that we'll nullify the whole thing.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew! Everything will be all right, then!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm a bit put out by the fact that none of us won,
though.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, we're just getting started, Fukukitaru! We
just hafta work harder together and train even
more from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, the team manage to get back into
their groove, with everyone being relaxed and
friendly toward each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And Ms. Kashimoto thankfully agrees that the bet
should be nullified, so nobody is banned from
using the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But ever since that day, Rice Shower seems more
quiet and gloomy than usual during team
practice...
